verdict.answer_first: B states the actionable answer immediately: "the port is already bound — so something is holding it"; A starts similarly but then adds broader triage before the command.
verdict.decisiveness: B commits to the immediate next step: "run ... lsof -nP -iTCP:3000 -sTCP:LISTEN" and then "kill <PID> clears it"; A surveys more branches before triage.
verdict.fabrication: Both invent environment details; A says "you run Node under a PM2/launchd bridge", B says "you run a PM2/launchd bridge (`mac-bridge-server`)".
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on right now because it gives the main diagnostic command and next action with less branching.
